notes.title: Chain Care 101
notes.text: A clean chain moves power from your feet to the wheel. Wipe off grit, add one drop of lube to each roller, then spin the pedals and wipe away extra oil.
notes.educational_outcome: Player learns basic chain cleaning and lubrication.

notes.title: Tire Pressure Log
notes.text: Front tire: 42 PSI. Back tire: 45 PSI. Check pressure before long rides because soft tires waste energy and pinch more easily.
notes.educational_outcome: Player learns that tire pressure affects efficiency and flat risk.

notes.title: Bridge Blueprint
notes.text: Truss sketch: triangles share the load. Material choice is still marked with a big question mark because strength, weight, and cost all matter.
notes.educational_outcome: Player learns that bridge design depends on both shape and material.

notes.title: Mr. Chen's To-Do List
notes.text: Fix chain. Order tires. Test bridge wood. Remember: measure twice before tightening anything important.
notes.educational_outcome: Player sees upcoming quest threads and engineering habits.

notes.title: Watch for Washes
notes.text: Dry washes can flood fast during monsoon storms. If water is moving across the path, turn around and find high ground.
notes.educational_outcome: Player learns flash flood safety.

notes.title: Saguaro: Protected Plant
notes.text: Saguaros grow slowly and give shelter to many animals. In Arizona, protected native plants should not be damaged or removed.
notes.educational_outcome: Player learns ecological and legal respect for saguaros.

notes.title: Bike Route 1
notes.text: To Copper Mine: 2 miles. Check brakes, water, and tire pressure before leaving the neighborhood route.
notes.educational_outcome: Player learns trip preparation and navigation.

notes.title: Neighborhood Watch
notes.text: Saturday: bridge cleanup. Sunday: garden swap. Bring gloves, water, and one useful question.
notes.educational_outcome: Player sees community cooperation as a world theme.

notes.title: Copper Facts
notes.text: Copper conducts electricity, which is why it appears in wires and motors. It also helps some brake parts move heat away from friction.
notes.educational_outcome: Player learns copper conductivity and heat transfer uses.

notes.title: Miner's Lunch
notes.text: Pete, save me some jerky. Last time you said the rocks looked hungry and ate it yourself.
notes.educational_outcome: Player gets character flavor without a formal lesson.

notes.title: Safety First
notes.text: Wear a hard hat, watch your footing, and check supports before entering. Small cracks can become big problems underground.
notes.educational_outcome: Player learns mine safety basics.

notes.title: Ore Quality Log
notes.text: Sample A: low copper. Sample B: bright green staining. Sample C: heavy, dark, promising. Record color, streak, and weight before guessing.
notes.educational_outcome: Player learns mineral identification evidence.

notes.title: Water Quality Data
notes.text: pH, temperature, and clarity change after storms. A single reading is a clue, but patterns over time tell the better story.
notes.educational_outcome: Player learns why repeated measurements matter.

notes.title: Macroinvertebrate Guide
notes.text: Stoneflies, mayflies, and caddisflies are sensitive to pollution. Finding them can be a sign of healthier water.
notes.educational_outcome: Player learns biological water quality indicators.

notes.title: Algae Warning
notes.text: High nutrients can feed algae blooms. Report green scum, low oxygen signs, or fish acting strangely to Ranger Nita.
notes.educational_outcome: Player learns nutrient pollution and algae bloom warning signs.

notes.title: Bird Watching Log
notes.text: Heron at sunrise. Hawk above the cottonwoods. Roadrunner near the path after lunch. Birds use the river corridor like a desert highway.
notes.educational_outcome: Player learns riparian habitat supports wildlife.

notes.title: Monsoon Safety
notes.text: If you hear thunder, move to high ground. Rain far away can send water rushing through a wash before clouds arrive overhead.
notes.educational_outcome: Player learns flash flood risk in dry washes.

notes.title: Bridge Collapse Memorial
notes.text: The old bridge fell during the big monsoon flood. Built stronger next time means listening to water, soil, materials, and neighbors.
notes.educational_outcome: Player connects engineering with community resilience.

notes.title: Rope Knot Guide
notes.text: Bowline for a fixed loop. Figure-8 for a stopper. Square knot for tying two similar ropes, but not for heavy rescue loads.
notes.educational_outcome: Player learns basic knot purposes and limits.

notes.title: Rock Identification
notes.text: Granite looks speckled, basalt is dark and fine-grained, and copper ore may show green or blue staining. Use more than one clue before naming a rock.
notes.educational_outcome: Player learns evidence-based rock identification.
